title: Two Player SMP
description: A lightweight Fabric 1.21.4 modpack designed for small multiplayer worlds. Perfect for two friends to play together with QoL and performance mods.
body:
# Two Player SMP

**Play Minecraft with a friend in a small, cozy 2-player world! This modpack is designed to keep things simple, fun, and smooth while adding quality-of-life improvements and small mods that enhance the vanilla experience without overwhelming it.**
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/047eca71a8b46bf83f1573630a7311b4258fd0ea_0.webp)
# **Features**

Performance Boosts: Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, and Krypton for smooth gameplay

Quality-of-Life Mods: Xaero’s Minimap, AppleSkin, ShulkerBoxTooltip, BetterF3, and Mouse Tweaks

Visual Enhancements: Sodium and Indium for better graphics and smoother lighting

Small Fun Additions: Waystones, Farmer’s Delight, Artifacts — optional mods that add variety without clutter
